overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a cowboy character leading a horse along a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a handheld lantern. The character briefly stops as the horse rears up before continuing through increasingly open grassland terrain under a starry sky.

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily along a narrow dirt path, holding a lantern in left hand and leading a horse with the right hand

notable_agents.action: dark brown horse with white markings walking calmly beside the character, following the lead rope

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail through the forest floor
tall dense trees forming a dark wall along the left side of the path
tall dense trees forming a dark wall along the right side of the path
warm yellow circular light pool illuminating the ground ahead of the character

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily through a dense forest at night, the path illuminated only by the handheld lantern. Tall oak trees line both sides creating an enclosed corridor, while the horse follows calmly beside the character on the narrow dirt trail.

events.description: character stops abruptly as the horse rears up on its hind legs, spooked by something in the darkness
character calms the horse and resumes walking forward along the path

agents.ego_description: character stops to calm the rearing horse, pats it reassuringly, then continues leading it through the more open terrain

notable_agents.action: horse rears up suddenly when spooked, then settles and continues walking calmly

entered.detail: expansive grassy clearing visible ahead with scattered bushes
dark silhouetted hills visible on the horizon under the night sky
isolated trees spaced apart replacing the dense forest wall

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up into wide grassland as the character continues walking. The horse briefly rears up when spooked around the 22-second mark, requiring the character to stop and calm it before proceeding. The terrain becomes more open with scattered trees and distant hills visible under the starry night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, lantern-lit forest trail into an expansive, starry grassland. It begins with the character walking steadily through a dense corridor of tall oak trees, where the only light emanates from a handheld lantern casting shadows across the narrow dirt path. As the forest gradually opens up, the enclosed canopy gives way to wide grasslands and scattered trees under a clear night sky. The forward momentum briefly pauses when the horse rears up in a moment of alarm, requiring the character to stop and calm the animal before proceeding. The scene finally expands further across the open terrain, revealing distant hills silhouetted against the stars.
